name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-creative-validate
description: MyndHyve ads.creative.validate — full compliance scanner combining built-in policy text rules, placement text-length checks, AND asset-format checks (image/video dimensions, file sizes, durations). Caller supplies placement spec data via inputs (resolve upstream from vendor.myndhyve.ads-platforms OR host.adPlatformSpecs).
author: MyndHyve
